name_for_human: AI TO AI HOLDING Рђћ Thai Trade Intelligence
description_for_model: Thai Customs Intelligence API with 14 AI engines. Core: HS code classification (Thai+English), import duty (MFN), best FTA rate across 13 agreements, OGA permits (36 agencies), Halal compliance (21 countries). Intelligence: Landed Cost Calculator (11 Incoterms), Price Benchmark (under-valuation detection), Freight Auditor (overcharge detection), What-If Optimizer (route/FTA simulation), Customs Audit Risk Score, CBAM Carbon Tracker (EU compliance), ASEAN expansion (6 countries). Every response includes SHA-256 audit hash. Sandbox: POST /v1/sandbox/classify (no auth). Production: X-API-Key required.
description_for_human: 14 AI engines for Thai trade compliance. HS classification + 13 FTA rates + 36 OGA agencies + Halal (21 countries) + Landed Cost + Freight Audit + CBAM Carbon + ASEAN 6 countries. SHA-256 evidence chain on every answer.

input_languages.en: Accepts English product descriptions e.g. hydraulic excavator, frozen shrimp
input_languages.mixed: Thai and English keywords can be combined in a single description

halal_engine.note: Checks halal certification requirement per destination country

oga_engine.note: Returns required permit agencies per HS code Рђћ covers all Thai regulatory bodies

intelligence_engines.cbam_carbon: CO2 calculator, EU CBAM compliance, 6 sectors
intelligence_engines.asean_expansion: 6 countries: TH, VN, MY, ID, PH, SG

audit.ckan_fallback: Queries Thai Customs CKAN open data when keyword match is insufficient
